svg.title: Spoovel v0 Field Test Sheet
svg.desc: A one-page printable worksheet for community crews testing whether the Spoovel v0 improves sack-filling work. Includes baseline test, Spoovel v0 test, success threshold, repair notes, and scale gate.
svg.text: Spoovel v0 — Field Test Sheet
Fox's Anvil: Open Resilience Tools · fill in by hand · share what you learn · no rights reserved
Crew size: _______
Material tested (circle): sandbag soil compost mulch erosion sack other: ___________
Approx. sack weight: _______ kg Sack type / size: _______________________________
1 · Baseline test — hand filling, no tool
Time to fill 20 sacks: _____________ min
Spills or failed fills: _______
Sacks needing rework: _______
Body strain — circle what applied:
Back · Shoulders · Wrists · Knees · Arms · Neck · None noticed
Severity (circle): mild moderate significant stopped work early
Failure / spillage / rework notes:
Did anyone need to stop or rest? Yes / No Reason: _________________________________
2 · Spoovel v0 test — same material, same crew
Time to fill 20 sacks: _____________ min
Spills or failed fills: _______
Sacks needing rework: _______
Body strain — circle what applied:
Back · Shoulders · Wrists · Knees · Arms · Neck · None noticed
Severity (circle): mild moderate significant stopped work early
What broke, jammed, bent, or slowed the crew (circle all that apply):
Chute bolt · Bag holder · Wheel / axle · Rope / winch · Handle · Frame joint · Other: _________
Describe what happened:
Did the tool make the work possible for more people? Yes / No / Unsure
Could a person with limited mobility or strength use it? Yes / No / With modification
3 · Success threshold — did it earn its materials?
The Spoovel v0 passes if it achieves at least one of the following. Circle each that applies.
□ Faster total time than baseline
Baseline: _____ min Spoovel: _____ min Difference: _____ min
□ Reduced body strain reported by crew
Baseline strain: _____________ Spoovel strain: _____________
□ Less wasted material or fewer rework sacks
Baseline rework: _______ Spoovel rework: _______
□ Made the work possible for more kinds of bodies
Overall verdict (circle): PASSES · NEEDS WORK · DOES NOT PASS THIS TEST
4 · Repair notes
Repaired with common tools? Yes / No Tools needed: _______________________________
Time to repair in field: _____________ min
What should be simplified or removed? _______________________________________
Other repair or redesign notes:
5 · Do not scale yet unless all four are true
□ The v0 filled 20 sacks repeatedly without stopping
□ The failure points are understood and documented above
□ The tool was repaired in the field with common tools
□ Crew reports less strain or a better workflow than baseline
If any box is unchecked — fix it before building another unit or adding modules.
Share this sheet with your steward, mutual-aid network, or community workshop. Annotate freely.
Spoovel v0 · Fox's Anvil: Open Resilience Tools · commons field sheet · no rights reserved
Read it → test one thing → write down what happened → share what you learned
